Module 5
Creating Your PLC, Part 5
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

Other Types of PLC
Many other types of Prelaunch Content in addition to video…
• 	Audio - generally not recommended. Turn it into Screencap and it
will raise the perceived value dramatically
• 	PDF Report - can be very effective, especially if combined with
video. Can be:
• 	Written report
• 	Process map
• 	Mind map
• 	Flow chart
• 	Infographic
• 	High perceived value, can be great for generating opt-ins
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

Even More Kinds of PLC
Webinar or Teleseminar - can use it during your Prelaunch or after you
open your cart
• 	freeconferencecall.com
• 	instsantteleseminar.com
• 	gotowebinar.com
Software - giving away software as Prelaunch Content can be very
effective, but this is one thing I haven’t done… so you’re on your own ;-)
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

Remember
▪ 	“Horses for courses”
▪ 	What you use depends on your situation AND on your assets
▪ 	Video is really great for LOTS of situations… it’s good to get
comfortable with video
▪ 	It’s about progress, not perfection
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
